item.title: Moderna agrees to pay up to $2.87 billion to settle Covid-19 vaccine patent dispute
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Under the deal, Moderna will pay US$950 million (S$1.21 billion) upfront in July 2026.
Matched: ai(+3), vaccine(+3), covid(+2)

item.title: Tunisia jails tycoon Mabrouk for corruption, former PM for handling of case
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TUNIS, March 3 - A Tunisian court on Tuesday jailed the country's richest businessman, Marouan Mabrouk, for corruption while giving prison terms to a former prime minister and several other former cabinet members for their handling of the case.
Matched: corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Travellers stranded, airlines under pressure as Iran war escalates
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Thousands are stranded as major Gulf hubs, including Dubai, remain closed or severely restricted for a fourth day.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Oman renews push for diplomacy, says ‘off-ramps available’ in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Oman had been mediating talks between Iran and the US before Washington attacked Tehran.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Analysis-Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Trump Commerce chief agrees to testify in congressional Epstein probe
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, a billionaire former New York financier, has faced pressure over his associations with the now-deceased Epstein.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Is the US at war with Iran, and will it put boots on the ground?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Some of the main questions asked about the military developments in the Middle East, and what we know so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump insists he struck Iran on his own terms
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
"Based on the way the negotiation was going, I think they (Iran) were going to attack first. And I didn't want that to happen," said US President Donald Trump.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Protests in Venezuela against US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Protesters in Venezuela have rallied outside the Iranian Embassy to condemn the US-Israeli war on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Oil on Fire: War impacts global energy markets
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attacks on energy facilities, along with Iran blockading the Strait of Hormuz, are raising global oil and gas prices.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump commerce chief Howard Lutnick agrees to testify in congressional Epstein probe
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He has faced pressure over his associations with the now-deceased Epstein.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump's national security team pushes war on Iran in Congress
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - U.S. President Donald Trump's top national security advisers spent much of the day on Tuesday making the case to Congress for the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, describing a rapidly evolving operation and leaving open the possibility of sending in American troops, Democrats and Trump's fellow Republicans said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump, Rubio offer conflicting reasons for US entry into Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Trump said Iran was going to strike first, while Rubio said Iran would react to an Israeli attack.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Apple raises MacBook Air and Pro prices in face of memory crunch
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Like other hardware manufacturers, Apple is contending with surging memory chip prices.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Rubio claim of Israeli role in US Iran attack reverberates, despite denial
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Commentators across political spectrum, including MAGA base, seize on Rubio's words amid shifting war justifications.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Macron warns Israel against Lebanon invasion
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
French President Emmanuel Macron has warned Israel against invading Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US turns up heat on Venezuela with threat to indict new leader Delcy Rodriguez
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Federal prosecutors have put together possible corruption and money laundering charges against her.
Matched: corruption(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Epstein estate’s $44 million settlement with accusers wins preliminary judge approval
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
A deal would end a 2024 lawsuit filed against his former personal lawyer and former accountant.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US court convicts Japanese yakuza for trafficking nuclear material
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He was also accused of trying to sell military-grade nuclear material, along with narcotics.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Cuba charges six exiles with terrorism in speedboat attack
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Cuba’s Interior Ministry accused the Cuban exiles of opening fire on a border guard vessel.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Merz says he urged Trump to increase pressure on Putin
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, speaking after a meeting with Donald Trump on Tuesday, said he had urged the president to put pressure on Russian President Vladimir Putin over the war in Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UK, France send warships, air defence assets to Cyprus after drone attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The development comes after an Iranian-made drone crashed into the UK's military base in Cyprus.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: What are the implications of Iran’s strikes on Gulf Arab states?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran is launching attacks across the Gulf region after the US-Israel operation against the country.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Britain, France and Greece send air-defence forces to Cyprus base after drone strike
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
An Iran-made Shahed drone, likely launched by Hezbollah, hit the British base’s runway on March 2.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)
